mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, coalesce(bu.nick_name, bu.user_name) as buyer_name, coalesce(sc.store_name, sc.creator_name) as seller_name, o.order_amount, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.source_type, o.source_id, o.source_name, o.quantity, o.address_snapshot, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark from creative_custom_order o left join sys_user bu on bu.user_id = o.buyer_id left join creative_creator sc on sc.creator_id = o.seller_id
mapper.insert: insert into creative_custom_order (order_no, buyer_id, seller_id, order_amount, order_status, pay_status, source_type, source_id, source_name, quantity, address_snapshot, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceName}, #{quantity}, #{addressSnapshot}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from creative_custom_order where order_id in
#{orderId}
